name: Crispy Corn Dogs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, mix together the flour, cornmeal, baking powder, and salt.
2. Using a pastry blender or fork, cut in the shortening until the mixture resembles fine crumbs.
3. In a small bowl, combine the egg and milk. Add to the dry mixture and mix well.
4. Pat the frankfurters dry with paper towels. Dip each frank into the batter using tongs, making sure all sides are coated. Let excess batter drip off.
5. Carefully drop 1 or 2 frankfurters at a time into hot oil in a mini-fryer.
6. Fry until golden brown, about 1 minute on each side.
7. Using a wooden skewer, turn off the heat and remove the corn dogs from the oil.
8. Serve hot with mustard if desired.
